description: Schema-driven corpus for template-injection. SSTI is semantic (data-vs-code at the template boundary), so the runner smoke-validates shape; fixtures double as ground truth for the LLM eval harness (evals/).

fixtures.text:
from jinja2 import Template
Template('Hello ' + request.args['name']).render()
fixtures.reason: user input concatenated into the template source string (CWE-1336)

fixtures.text:
from jinja2 import Template
Template('Hello {{ name }}').render(name=request.args['name'])
fixtures.reason: user data passed as a bound context value to a static template

fixtures.text:
tmpl = db.get_email_template(user_id)  # body is user-editable
render_template_string(tmpl, **ctx)
fixtures.reason: template body loaded from a user-writable store

fixtures.text:
body := renderToString(tmpl, data) // interpolates data["name"] into template text
t, _ := template.New("x").Parse(body)
t.Execute(w, data)
fixtures.reason: rendered string re-parsed and executed as a template (double render, CWE-94)
unbounded user-controlled loop with no output cap (CWE-770)
autoescape disabled while rendering user data
